articles.title: Pfizer (PFE) Stock Looks Fairly Priced With Pipeline Risks In View
articles.summary: After a tough stretch for shareholders over the last five years, with Pfizer stock down about 22% over that window, the current valuation sits in a middle ground where the broader pricing checks look mixed rather than clearly cheap or clearly expensive. Pfizer has delivered a decline of roughly 22% over five years, which frames any current pricing as a potential reset rather than the tail end of a long rally. Recent approvals and oncology progress can support expectations for future cash...

articles.title: What Could Push LLY Stock Higher From Here?
articles.summary: While the market focuses on a single class of blockbuster drugs, a different story is unfolding inside the company. Lilly’s immunology, oncology, and neuroscience medicines are quietly compounding at a blistering pace. These other therapeutic areas collectively grew by 160% last quarter, a rate that suggests a much broader growth engine is taking shape.
